tasks.label: Tauri: dev (WSL)
tasks.detail: Linux-target dev task. For /mnt/<drive> repo roots, prefer Tauri: dev (Windows) for watcher reliability.

tasks.label: WSL Agent: dev
args: export PATH="/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"; export INTERMEDIARY_AGENT_PORT=3142; export INTERMEDIARY_WINDOWS_LOCALAPPDATA=/mnt/c/Users/Johnf/AppData/Local; set -e; if [ -s "/home/johnf/.cargo/env" ]; then . "/home/johnf/.cargo/env"; else echo "cargo env not found at /home/johnf/.cargo/env" >&2; exit 1; fi; cd /home/johnf/code/intermediary; command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "cargo not available in PATH" >&2; exit 1; }; bash ./scripts/dev/run_wsl_agent_dev.sh

tasks.label: Tauri: dev (Windows)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WIN_PATH='D:\code\intermediary'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_PATH='/home/johnf/code/intermediary'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_DISTRO='Ubuntu'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_BACKEND_MODE='external'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_LOG_DIR='\\wsl$\Ubuntu\home\johnf\code\intermediary\logs'; wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd /home/johnf/code/intermediary && ./scripts/windows/sync_to_windows.sh'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Set-Location $env:INTERMEDIARY_WIN_PATH; if (-not (Test-Path node_modules)) { pnpm install; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:INTERMEDIARY_LOG_DIR | Out-Null; node scripts/build/ensure_agent_bundle.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if (-not (Test-Path 'src-tauri/resources/agent_bundle/im_host_agent.exe')) { Write-Error 'Missing src-tauri/resources/agent_bundle/im_host_agent.exe after ensure_agent_bundle'; exit 1 }; pnpm tauri dev

tasks.label: Tauri: dev (Windows, watch + sync)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WIN_PATH='D:\code\intermediary'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_PATH='/home/johnf/code/intermediary'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_DISTRO='Ubuntu'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_BACKEND_MODE='external'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_LOG_DIR='\\wsl$\Ubuntu\home\johnf\code\intermediary\logs'; $winPath = $env:INTERMEDIARY_WIN_PATH; wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd /home/johnf/code/intermediary && ./scripts/windows/sync_to_windows.sh'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Start-Process wsl.exe -ArgumentList '-d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "cd /home/johnf/code/intermediary && ./scripts/windows/watch_sync_to_windows.sh"'; if (-not (Test-Path $winPath)) { Write-Error "Sync did not create $winPath"; exit 1 }; Set-Location $winPath; if (-not (Test-Path node_modules)) { pnpm install; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $env:INTERMEDIARY_LOG_DIR | Out-Null; node scripts/build/ensure_agent_bundle.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if (-not (Test-Path 'src-tauri/resources/agent_bundle/im_host_agent.exe')) { Write-Error 'Missing src-tauri/resources/agent_bundle/im_host_agent.exe after ensure_agent_bundle'; exit 1 }; pnpm tauri dev

tasks.label: Tauri: build installer (Windows)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WIN_PATH='D:\code\intermediary'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_PATH='/home/johnf/code/intermediary'; $env:INTERMEDIARY_WSL_DISTRO='Ubuntu'; wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'cd /home/johnf/code/intermediary && bash ./scripts/build/build_agent_bundle.sh && ./scripts/windows/sync_to_windows.sh'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Set-Location $env:INTERMEDIARY_WIN_PATH; if (-not (Test-Path node_modules)) { pnpm install; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; node scripts/build/ensure_agent_bundle.mjs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if (-not (Test-Path 'src-tauri/resources/agent_bundle/im_host_agent.exe')) { Write-Error 'Missing src-tauri/resources/agent_bundle/im_host_agent.exe after ensure_agent_bundle'; exit 1 }; pnpm tauri build
